evidence_basis.interpretation: Across ENG/ESP/GER/ITA/FRA, retrospective average market 1X2 probabilities materially outperform the current formal baseline on Brier/RPS. This establishes source-priority only; the historical prices lack original quote timestamps and remain ineligible for formal PIT use.

purpose: Accumulate genuine future point-in-time synchronized market snapshots so 2026/27 and later can be tested without retrospective timestamp ambiguity.

storage.format: one immutable JSON record per source snapshot plus SHA-256 canonical payload hash

current_match_policy: For user-requested pre-match analysis, freeze the market at question time. A validated snapshot may support the registered market-residual anchor for that match, subject to CURRENT data-quality and synchronization gates.
future_validation_policy: Prospective snapshots collected before kickoff may later enter chronological OOF research. No 2025/26 retrospective market reference may be relabeled as prospective PIT evidence.
